prompt_text: Mixpanel vs PostHog pricing and features
response:
# Mixpanel vs PostHog: Pricing & Features Comparison

## **Pricing Model**

| Feature | Mixpanel | PostHog |
|---------|----------|---------|
| **Free Tier** | Up to 500K events/month | Up to 1M events/month |
| **Pricing Structure** | Usage-based (per tracked user) | Usage-based (per tracked event) |
| **Enterprise** | Custom pricing | Custom pricing |
| **Self-hosting** | Not available | Open source + self-hosted options |

### Typical Costs
- **Mixpanel**: ~$999-$2,000+/month (starts at $999 for Growth plan)
- **PostHog**: ~$500-$2,000+/month, or free if self-hosted

---

## **Core Features Comparison**

### **Analytics & Insights**
| Feature | Mixpanel | PostHog |
|---------|----------|---------|
| Event tracking | ✅ Advanced | ✅ Advanced |
| User segmentation | ✅ Excellent | ✅ Good |
| Funnel analysis | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes |
| Retention analysis | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes |
| Cohort analysis | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes |
| Custom dashboards | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes |

### **Feature Flags & Experimentation**
| Feature | Mixpanel | PostHog |
|---------|----------|---------|
| Feature flags | ❌ No | ✅ **Native** |
| A/B testing | ❌ Limited | ✅ **Native** |
| Multivariate testing | ❌ No | ✅ Yes |
| Experiment analysis | ❌ No | ✅ Yes |

### **Session Recording & Heatmaps**
| Feature | Mixpanel | PostHog |
|---------|----------|---------|
| Session replay | ❌ No | ✅ Yes |
| Heatmaps | ❌ No | ✅ Yes |
| Rage click detection | ❌ No | ✅ Yes |

### **Data & Privacy**
| Feature | Mixpanel | PostHog |
|---------|----------|---------|
| Self-hosted option | ❌ No | ✅ Yes (Open source) |
| Data residency | ✅ EU/US | ✅ Flexible |
| GDPR compliance | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes |
| Data ownership | Cloud-based | You own it |

---

## **Key Strengths**

### **Mixpanel**
- 🎯 Superior user analytics and cohort capabilities
- 📊 More mature platform with deeper insights
- 🔧 Better integrations with marketing tools
- 👥 Excellent for product-led growth (PLG) companies
- 📈 Strong SQL-like query capabilities

### **PostHog**
- 🚀 All-in-one platform (analytics + flags + experiments + replays)
- 💰 Better value for money
- 🔒 Self-hosting option (cost savings for large scale)
- 🛠️ Native feature flags & A/B testing
- 📹 Session replay built-in
- 🧑‍💻 Developer-friendly, good documentation

---

## **Best For**

### **Mixpanel** 👉
- Analytics-first companies
- Need advanced user behavioral insights
- PLG/SaaS metrics focus
- Larger budgets
- Complex funnel/retention analysis

### **PostHog** 👉
- Teams wanting all-in-one solution
- Budget-conscious startups
- Need feature flags & experiments
- Want data ownership/self-hosting
- Developer-heavy teams
- Need session replay + heatmaps

---

## **Quick Decision Matrix**

```
CHOOSE MIXPANEL if:
✅ Analytics depth is #1 priority
✅ Budget not constrained
✅ Don't need feature flags/experiments
✅ Want mature, battle-tested platform

CHOOSE POSTHOG if:
✅ Want complete product toolkit
✅
